concerns.text: FR-006 requires validating the proxy assumption on a hold-out set of 'at least 20 trajectories'. Task T014 validates on the 'Validation set' but does not explicitly mandate a minimum size of 20 trajectories, nor does it guarantee the Validation set is distinct from the Ablation-Train set used for ground truth generation, risking data leakage or insufficient sample size for the specific requirement.

SC-002 requires verifying a token reduction of 'at least 30%'. Task T022a explicitly states 'Do NOT exit with code 1 if passed is false', allowing the pipeline to complete and generate reports even if the success criterion is failed. This contradicts the requirement that the outcome be a pass/fail verification of the research hypothesis.

User Story 3 and SC-003 require applying a 'Bonferroni correction' for multiple hypothesis tests (win rate AND token usage). Task T025 mentions applying it to 'all p-values' generically but fails to explicitly mandate the correction for the specific simultaneous comparison of both metrics, which is necessary to control the family-wise error rate as defined in the spec.

The spec's edge case handling for 'insufficient samples' (n < 300) states the system must 'log a warning... and recommend expanding the dataset' while defaulting to a heuristic (fixed k=2). Task T008c enforces a 'CRITICAL error' and 'SKIPS classifier training entirely' (blocking T009) if n < 300, contradicting the spec's fallback logic that allows the system to proceed with a simpler heuristic rather than halting.

FR-001 requires extracting 'ground-truth memory layer utility' via ablation study. While T008/T008b run ablation on Ablation-Train and Validation sets, there is no explicit task to perform ablation on a specific held-out subset of the Test Set (or a dedicated proxy-validation set) to generate the ground truth required to verify the proxy assumption (FR-006) independently of the training data.
